projects.name: ExchangeAdminWeb
projects.role: Main app: EXO / Graph / on-prem AD administration portal, 21 modules

verification.ci: ACTIVE: .github/workflows/ci.yml runs on push to master and on every PR. Job build-test (windows-latest): dotnet build -c Release, dotnet format --verify-no-changes, dotnet test on the solution, test-result upload. Job powershell (windows-latest): PSScriptAnalyzer (fails on Error) + Invoke-Pester tests/ps. Observed failing on real test failures, so CI is a trustworthy gate. Still run local verification before claiming completion; treat CI as an additional gate.

policy.code_changes: Run current automated verification before claiming completion.
policy.docs_only: Code verification is not required unless docs affect setup, commands, runtime behavior, generated files, or user-visible behavior.
policy.manual_behavior: Run the relevant manual check, smoke test, or playtest for behavior not covered by automation (operator workflows, dev deployment, Delinea secret creation, section access groups), or state clearly that it was not run.

notes: docs/ProjectConstitution.md is the highest engineering authority and is not duplicated in AGENTS.md.
CLAUDE.md is a pointer shim that includes AGENTS.md for the Claude Code harness.
Two independent version bumps: app-wide changes bump ExchangeAdminWeb.csproj; module-scoped changes bump Modules/ModuleCatalog.cs.
